## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build` and `dotnet test` pass locally (zero warnings; warnings are errors).
- [ ] Public surface changes are reflected in `PublicAPI.Shipped.txt` (the analyzer enforces this).
- [ ] New public members carry XML documentation.
- [ ] Seeded output and goldens are unchanged, or the change is intentional and called out below.
